'''Bowman Gavin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wing]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and later the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he became a member of [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] where he flew during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|battle]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. The battle was a success when the [[Death Star II/Legends|second Death Star]] was destroyed, which included the [[Death/Legends|deaths]] of [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]. [[Standard year/Legends|Years]] later, Gavin served as the director of flight personnel for the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].
